game_name: Wizardry: Proving Grounds of the Mad Overlord

sub_pixel_system.notes: Not applicable - turn-based dungeon crawler, no real-time movement system

tier_notes: Wizardry: Proving Grounds of the Mad Overlord is a turn-based dungeon crawler RPG with no real-time platformer mechanics. Movement occurs through text-based menu navigation and grid-based maze traversal. No physics-based movement, jumping, gravity, or acceleration systems exist in this game. Player movement is abstract and menu-driven rather than physics-based.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Wizardry: Proving Grounds of the Mad Overlord (NES)
Wikipedia - Wizardry: Proving Grounds of the Mad Overlord
